creator: boris@tagnet.ru
text:
I have a working configuration with exim+clamav. After upgrading to 0.90 (and 0.90_2)
    version of ClamAV my system stops passing multipart RARv3 archives. Error from clamd.log
    
/var/spool/exim/scan/1HJQ6z-000IwT-PI/1HJQ6z-000IwT-PI-00002.com: Not supported data format ERROR

Fix: 

Unknown yet.
How-To-Repeat: 	Upgrade to ClamAV 0.90 and try to send mutipart RARv3 archive.
